title: No Explosion Particles
description: This texture pack removes particles created by explosions. Immediately makes you better at crystal PvP.
body: This texture pack removes the particles that appear when an explosion happens, to allow you to see better when TNT mining or playing crystal pvp. Use this with my other texture pack [No Explosion Sounds](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/no-explosion-sounds) to get instantly better at crystal pvp.
